wins.event: Record Q3 net inflows $221B (highest ever); 8% organic asset growth, 5% organic base fee growth
Record revenue $5.2B (+15% YoY); operating income $2.1B (+26% YoY); EPS $11.46 (+5%)
GIP closed Oct 1 — added $116B AUM, $70B fee-paying; ~$250M Q4 management fees
Microsoft + MGX AI infrastructure partnership announced; Aladdin ACV +15% YoY

risks.event: Effective fee rate -0.4 bps QoQ on US equity outperformance and lower sec lending
Tax rate 26% in Q3 (vs prior year benefit) impacted EPS growth
FY 2024 G&A growth at high end of low-to-mid single digit range due to GIP integration

guidance.notes: Effective fee rate to receive 0.5-1 bps positive impact from GIP private market fees. Q4 buybacks maintained at $375M minimum; Preqin close around year-end.

_notes: Best quarter in BLK history per CFO. Record inflows, margin expansion +350bps, GIP closed and Microsoft AI partnership. Peak conviction.
